title: Rebuilding a multi-location patient acquisition engine
summary: A full-funnel Meta Ads rebuild paired with CRM automation cut cost-per-booked-appointment by more than half across five clinic locations.
problem: Aurora was spending heavily on Meta Ads with no lead-to-appointment tracking, so budget kept shifting toward the loudest metric — clicks — instead of booked patients.
approach: We rebuilt the campaign structure around booked appointments as the optimization event, connected ad data to their CRM, and redesigned the booking funnel to remove friction.
execution: New creative testing system across 5 clinics, CRM-based conversion tracking via server-side events, automated appointment-reminder sequences, and a weekly revenue-attribution dashboard.
testimonialQuote: For the first time we can see exactly which ads turn into booked patients, not just clicks.

title: Automating client onboarding for a growing accounting firm
summary: An AI-assisted intake and onboarding system replaced 12+ hours of manual admin work per week, without adding headcount.
problem: Every new client meant manual document collection, scheduling back-and-forth, and duplicate data entry across three separate tools.
approach: We mapped the full onboarding journey and designed an automation layer connecting their intake form, CRM, and document storage — with AI handling first-pass data extraction.
execution: Automated intake forms, AI-assisted document parsing, CRM pipeline automation, and Slack notifications for the team when action was needed.
testimonialQuote: We took on 30% more clients this year without hiring a single extra admin.

title: A CRM built around how the sales team actually sells
summary: A ground-up GoHighLevel implementation gave a 14-person sales team one shared pipeline, automated follow-up, and real close-rate visibility.
problem: Leads were scattered across spreadsheets and personal phones. Follow-up was inconsistent, and leadership had no visibility into true close rates.
approach: We designed a pipeline structure matching their actual sales stages, migrated historical data, and layered in automated follow-up sequences for every stage.
execution: Custom GoHighLevel pipeline architecture, automated SMS/email nurture sequences, call tracking integration, and a leadership dashboard for close-rate reporting.
testimonialQuote: Every lead now gets followed up automatically. We stopped losing deals to slow response times.
testimonialAuthor: VP of Sales, Solace Home Services

title: One dashboard replacing six spreadsheets
summary: A unified analytics layer connecting marketing, product, and revenue data gave leadership a single source of truth for growth decisions.
problem: Marketing, sales, and product data lived in separate tools. Leadership spent hours each month reconciling numbers before a single decision could be made.
approach: We built a centralized data pipeline connecting their ad platforms, CRM, and product analytics into one live reporting layer.
execution: Cross-platform data integration, a real-time executive dashboard, automated weekly reporting emails, and self-serve views for each department.
testimonialQuote: We finally make growth decisions from one number, not six conflicting spreadsheets.
